_meta.note: English is the secondary international language. Must read like content written by a professional international team, not machine-translated from Vietnamese.

brand.slogan: The journey of Vietnamese people shining globally
brand.tagline: A platform for knowledge, programs, and community

dream_nurture.note: In English text, use 'Dream Nurture'. In Vietnamese text, use 'Nuôi Dưỡng Ước Mơ'. Do NOT mix in the same sentence.

verified_identity.note: In English text, use 'Verified Identity'. In Vietnamese text, use 'Danh Tính Đã Xác Thực'.

star_points.note: In English text, use 'Star Points'. In Vietnamese text, use 'Điểm Sao'.

digital_legacy.note: In English text, use 'Digital Legacy'. In Vietnamese text, use 'Kho Lưu Trữ Kỹ Thuật Số'.

form.agree_terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
form.agree_age: I confirm I am 18 or older, or have guardian consent

status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forbidden.note: These words MUST NOT appear on public pages. 'NDNUM' is an internal abbreviation, never for users. 'FOMO' is slang, not for formal content.
